# Copilot Instructions

This file is a short entry point for Copilot. The full, authoritative project rules live in [AGENTS.md](/x:/Dev/ArtifactStudio/AGENTS.md).

## Must Read
- Follow the parent-child repository workflow in [AGENTS.md](/x:/Dev/ArtifactStudio/AGENTS.md).
- Also follow the workflow reference in [.github/GIT_WORKFLOW_PARENT_CHILD.md](/x:/Dev/ArtifactStudio/.github/GIT_WORKFLOW_PARENT_CHILD.md).

## Project Notes
- The application uses Diligent Engine for direct DX12 rendering.
- Child repos should only be edited when the user explicitly requests it.
